name: vscode-moonraker
description: Monitor your Klipper/Moonraker 3D printer directly in VS Code — temperatures, progress, live toolhead position, and printer controls in the sidebar.

moonraker.apiUrl.description: Moonraker API URL (without port, e.g. http://192.168.1.100)

moonraker.apiKey.markdownDescription: Moonraker API key for authenticated instances. Find it in your Moonraker web UI under **Access** → **API Keys**, or in `moonraker.conf` under `[authorization]`.

moonraker.temperatureHistorySize.description: Number of temperature data points to keep in history

moonraker.chamberSensorName.description: Klipper temperature_sensor name for chamber (e.g. "chamber"). Leave empty to disable.

moonraker.statusBar.showStatus.description: Show printer state in status bar

moonraker.statusBar.showFileName.description: Show current file name in status bar (only while printing)

moonraker.statusBar.showHotendTemp.description: Show hotend temperature in status bar

moonraker.statusBar.showBedTemp.description: Show bed temperature in status bar

moonraker.statusBar.showETA.description: Show ETA in status bar (only while printing)

moonraker.statusBar.showTotalTime.description: Show total elapsed print time in status bar (only while printing)

moonraker.notifications.enabled.description: Show VS Code notifications when the printer state changes (print started, finished, paused, etc.)

moonraker.webUiUrl.description: URL of your Mainsail or Fluidd interface (e.g. http://192.168.1.100). When set, a button to open it in the browser appears in the sidebar.

moonraker.webUiLabel.description: Label shown on the sidebar web UI button (e.g. "Open Mainsail" or "Open Fluidd")

moonraker.experimental.enabled.description: Enable experimental printer controls in the sidebar (emergency stop, homing, temperature adjustment, speed/fan control). Use with caution.

moonraker.experimental.positionVisualiza.description: Show a real-time top-down bed view with the toolhead position in the sidebar. Requires moonraker.experimental.enabled.

moonraker.bedWidth.description: Bed width in mm, used for the toolhead position visualization.

moonraker.bedHeight.description: Bed height (Y axis) in mm, used for the toolhead position visualization.

moonraker.positionPollingInterval.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for the toolhead position visualization.
